title: Yellow Noggles in Country of Colors and Culture
description: 0xdariush, the Nounish Nomad, is partnering with Yellow Collective to bring Yellow Noggles across Sri Lanka through travel content, photography, stickers, vlogs, and Web3 onboarding from February to April 2025.
details: 0xdariush, known as the Nounish Nomad, is a Nouns DAO grant winner, professional content creator, and full-time traveler partnering with Yellow Collective to spread the Nounish meme across Sri Lanka from February to April 2025. Building on his Roadmap Journey, where he traveled 3,000 km across the Middle East onboarding people to Web3, this project will use high-quality photo, video, drone, and social content to feature diverse faces wearing Yellow Noggles while expanding the Nounish People collection. Through eco-friendly travel, hostel stays, cultural homestays, surf clubs, co-working spaces, musician collaborations, sticker placements, WALKCASTER travel vlogs, and dedicated onboarding segments, 0xdariush will introduce artists, travelers, and digital nomads to Yellow Collective, Nouns, and the opportunities available through decentralized communities. The project brings adventure to the timeline while celebrating creativity, travel, and the Nounish vibe in both physical spaces across Sri Lanka and digital spaces across Farcaster and Web3.
